summary.headline: Bunge Limited Finance Corp. issued $1.2 billion in senior notes.
summary.narrative_summary: On March 17, 2026, Bunge Limited Finance Corp., a wholly-owned subsidiary of Bunge Global SA, completed the sale and issuance of $500 million aggregate principal amount of 4.800% Senior Notes due 2033 and $700 million aggregate principal amount of 5.150% Senior Notes due 2036.

ma_or_capital_allocation.description: Issued $500 million aggregate principal amount of 4.800% Senior Notes due 2033 and $700 million aggregate principal amount of 5.150% Senior Notes due 2036.

extraction_notes: Numbers are in millions of USD; cover sheet only had Item references, details from Exhibit 1.1.
